title: Super Light MC
description: This is an ultra light version of Minecraft that is kept up to date as soon as the newest versions come out.
body:
# ✨ Welcome to Super Light MC: The Ultimate Vanilla Boost

If you love the classic Minecraft experience but crave better framerates and smoother gameplay, look no further than Super Light MC.This pack is dedicated to performance at the highest level, making even the most intensive vanilla situations buttery smooth. We've utilized smart, powerful optimizations for lighting, world generation, and entity handling to turn your game into an FPS machine.

## More Than Just a Modpack: A Foundation for Fun

Super Light MC is much more than a simple set of mods—it's the ideal starting point for your modded adventure. Build upon this rock-solid, high-performance base by easily adding your own selection of mods, ensuring that your customized game still runs flawlessly from the start.
